title: ochrosia bodenheimarum
intro: Ochrosia bodenheimarum, also known as the Bodenheimer's ochrosia, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ochrosia bodenheimarum, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
